title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: After completing onboarding and tapping "Continue as Guest", verify the PPIP dialog appears with privacy notice and "Don't Share" / "Share Data" options.
expected: A PPIP (Product Performance Improvement Program) dialog should appear displaying: "Help us improve your experience." followed by a privacy notice explaining that HP may collect basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to improve performance and support, with clarification that no personal information is collected or shared with third parties, and that preferences can be changed anytime in Settings. The dialog includes two options: "Don't Share" and "Share Data".
